title: Web pilot analysis and closeout plan

metrics.label: Pre-test to post-test score gain
metrics.calculation: For each learner, subtract the pre-test score from the post-test score, then summarize individual and cohort average gain.

metrics.label: Lesson completion rate
metrics.calculation: Count completed lesson sessions per learner and divide by the ten planned lessons.

metrics.label: Recommendation effectiveness
metrics.calculation: Count recommendations followed by positive mastery, retention, or weakness movement in the next completed session.

metrics.label: Mastery movement
metrics.calculation: Compare first and final available mastery values per learner and skill, respecting AIM reliability and session caps.

metrics.label: Retention movement
metrics.calculation: Compare retention values before and after review recommendations for each practiced skill.

metrics.label: Weakness reduction
metrics.calculation: Compare early and late weakness signals for repeated concepts and summarize reductions or persistent gaps.

metrics.label: Data completeness
metrics.calculation: Count missing sessions, missing adaptive results, missing post-test records, and unresolved audit gaps.

report_sections.title: Cohort summary
report_sections.interpretation_rule: Describe participation and completion patterns without making clinical or diagnostic claims.

report_sections.title: Learning gain
report_sections.interpretation_rule: Report individual and cohort score movement as educational progress evidence only.

report_sections.title: AIM recommendation effectiveness
report_sections.interpretation_rule: Compare resolved AIM actions with follow-up learning signals and note where more evidence is needed.

report_sections.title: Educational safety review
report_sections.interpretation_rule: Confirm difficulty was not increased during high frustration, low reliability, or prerequisite gap conditions.

report_sections.title: Data quality and missing records
report_sections.interpretation_rule: Separate missing data from learner performance and avoid overinterpreting incomplete records.

report_sections.title: Next phase decision
report_sections.interpretation_rule: Choose the next phase from evidence quality, safety, and operational readiness rather than optimism.

decision_gates.title: Learning signal
decision_gates.condition: At least three learners show non-negative learning gain and no severe unresolved content blocker is identified.
decision_gates.pass_action: Prepare a slightly larger web pilot.
decision_gates.fail_action: Revise A1 content and repeat a short validation run.

decision_gates.title: Algorithm safety
decision_gates.condition: Recommendation actions align with resolved AIM decisions and difficulty does not increase under unsafe conditions.
decision_gates.fail_action: Pause adaptive difficulty increases and fix the decision path.

decision_gates.title: Data completeness
decision_gates.condition: Pre-test, post-test, session attempts, recommendations, and admin snapshots are complete or documented.
decision_gates.pass_action: Use pilot data for closeout reporting.
decision_gates.fail_action: Collect missing records or mark affected results as inconclusive.

decision_gates.title: Operator readiness
decision_gates.condition: The operator can run account setup, daily review, issue handling, and exports without developer intervention.
decision_gates.pass_action: Document the workflow for the next cohort.
decision_gates.fail_action: Improve runbook steps and admin dashboard visibility before expansion.

safety_notes: Do not use speed as a mastery or difficulty-increase signal.
Use educational terms such as prerequisite gap, weak retention, low confidence signal, hesitation, rushing, and concept misunderstanding.
Do not use medical diagnosis, clinical psychological labels, or mental health claims.
Separate high frustration signal from learner ability and use it only to adjust educational support.
next_phase_options: Repeat the five-learner pilot after content fixes.
Run a larger web pilot with the same architecture and stronger monitoring.
Move selected backend and React surfaces toward production hardening.
